title: Hybrid Developer
description: Full-Stack Software Developer with hands-on experience across mobile, web, and backend development, specializing in cloud infrastructure management and migration. Delivered end-to-end solutions using Flutter, Node.js, and React/Next.js while leading a critical live application migration from AWS to Azure, ensuring continuity and scalability on Microsoft's cloud ecosystem.
responsibilities: Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart for iOS and Android platforms
Built and maintained RESTful backend APIs and server-side services using Node.js
Designed and developed responsive web applications using React.js and Next.js frameworks
Managed and optimized MongoDB databases including schema design and query performance
Contributed to system design and architecture decisions for scalable application infrastructure
Deployed and managed cloud infrastructure and services using both AWS and Azure platforms
Led and executed the end-to-end live application migration from AWS to Microsoft Azure with zero data loss
Configured and managed Azure services including compute, storage, and networking components
Monitored application health and performance post-migration to ensure stability on Azure infrastructure
Collaborated on end-to-end feature development spanning mobile, web, and backend layers

title: Software Developer
description: Full-Stack Software Developer with expertise in cross-platform mobile development, web application engineering, and backend systems. Responsible for building and maintaining Flutter mobile apps, React/Next.js web frontends, and Node.js backend services, while contributing to database architecture using MongoDB and cloud infrastructure deployments on AWS.
responsibilities: Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart for iOS and Android platforms
Built and maintained RESTful backend APIs and server-side services using Node.js
Designed and developed responsive web applications using React.js and Next.js frameworks
Managed and optimized MongoDB databases including schema design and query performance
Contributed to system design and architecture decisions for scalable application infrastructure
Deployed and managed application services using AWS cloud platforms and services
Collaborated on end-to-end feature development spanning mobile, web, and backend layers
